description: Goodness-of-fit metrics the controller uses to pick a family. Each fit is judged by several complementary, lower-is-better metrics that are aggregated by rank, so no single metric can dominate: KL divergence captures density shape but is binning-sensitive, BIC penalises extra parameters, and KS and Wasserstein measure CDF-level agreement. A family must rank well across all of them to win.
